from __future__ import annotations


class ApiClient:
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        self.connected = False

    def connect(self) -> None:
        self.connected = True


_client: ApiClient | None = None


def module_singleton_client_side_effect_negative() -> ApiClient:
    global _client
    if _client is None:
        _client = ApiClient()
        _client.connect()
    return _client
